header.title: From booking to walking — in three steps
header.subtitle: Booking takes 30 seconds. The rest is on me.

steps.title: Book Your Spot
steps.description: Pick a date and reserve. Just your name and email.

steps.title: Meet at Alexanderplatz
steps.description: Find me at the World Clock. Look for the **GREEN UMBRELLA**.

steps.title: Walk + Tip
steps.description: Walk Berlin with me. Tip what feels fair at the end.
